so_ase.eval_ocean
*****************

-[ Functions ]-

+------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| "fesom_oce | Compute the ocean heat transport (OHT) into a region of interest during a particular       |
| an_heat_tr | period as the residual of the total surface heat flux during the period and ocean heat     |
| ansport_as | content change between the first and last timestep of the period, using FESOM2 model       |
| _residual" | output.                                                                                    |
| (...)      |                                                                                            |
+------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| "fesom_tim | Compute a time series of area-weighted mean vertical profiles for a specified region from  |
| eseries_of | FESOM2 model output.                                                                       |
| _mean_vert |                                                                                            |
| ical_profi |                                                                                            |
| le_in_regi |                                                                                            |
| on"(...)   |                                                                                            |
+------------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
